minor_fey.text: A lock of your hair
A shiny button
One of your tears
A bite of your meal
Your favorite childhood song
A feather from your cloak or hat
The color of your eyes (for a day)
A secret you’ve never told
Your shadow (until sunrise)
Three polite compliments, paid in public
A promise to water a certain tree
The sound of your laughter (one hour)
A drawing of your happiest memory
A trinket with no market value
Your true opinion of them, unvarnished
A small act of mischief on their behalf
A flower picked at dawn
A riddle they cannot answer
To be addressed only by a chosen title today
A hair ribbon, button, or charm to cherish

major_fey.text: A cherished memory (returned at dusk)
Your true name whispered privately
A favor owed, to be called later
The warmth of your hands for a night
Your voice for a day
Your most precious keepsake
A promise to right a small wrong
A story no one has ever heard
A duel of riddles (best two of three)
To carry a sealed letter into mortal lands
A token of fealty until the next full moon
A night of honest labor in their grove
The scent of your favorite food
A promise never to speak a certain lie again
A single tear of sincere remorse
To adopt a wayward sprite as a friend
A pledge to plant a tree in a specific place
Your reflection at noon, caught in a mirror
A small victory dedicated to their name
Silence during a sacred hour they choose

archfey.text: Your loyalty bound by oath for a year and a day
The memory of your first love
A fragment of your true name
Guardianship of a glade in perpetuity
To champion their cause in mortal courts
A year of your dreams while you sleep
Custody of a treasured heirloom until reclaimed
Your laughter, kept in a crystal vial
Stewardship over a mortal festival in their name
A vow to never break hospitality laws
The right to your shadow on every solstice
A promise to return when they call, no matter where
Your reflection each dawn for a month
Custody of a secret that must never be told
The tale of your death (whenever it comes)
A vow to mend a rift between rival fey courts
A geas to perform a heroic deed in their honor
The last page of your life’s story, unwritten
A lineage pledge: your house allied to theirs
A winter of silence—no spoken words
